name: Release Notes v3.3.0 - Inventory Planning API
body: [{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Release Notes v3.3.0 - Inventory Planning API"}], "data-id": "release-notes-v3-3-0-inventory-planning-api"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Release Date:", "bold": true}, {"text": " 27-03-19 "}, {"text": "| Version Note:", "bold": true}, {"text": " v3.3.0"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this release we have extended the functionality of the Inventory Planning API."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Inventory Planning updates", "bold": true}], "data-id": "inventory-planning-updates"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using the "}, {"text": "SaveProducts ", "bold": true}, {"text": "method, on a success response the following fields will be returned for each product created and updated:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Supplier SKU"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Product ID"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "View the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.retailexpressmedia.com%2Fdocumentation%2Fapi%2Fv2%2FRetail%2520Express%2520-%2520V2%2520Inventory%2520Planning%2520System%2520API.pdf", "children": [{"text": "Technical Manual"}]}, {"text": " for detailed information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Want more information? Find related articles here:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fress.zendesk.com%2Fhc%2Fen-us%2Fcategories%2F115000210393", "children": [{"text": "View all Release Notes"}]}]}]}]}]
